parsed.clarification_question: Which type of review do you want for this paragraph: a) writing polish and flow (focus on R1.6), b) logical consistency and evidence alignment (focus on R1.2 and R1.3), c) comprehensive review (all R1 dimensions), or d) no review (just acknowledgment)?

rationale.RX.1: The vague delegation implies a potential review where uncertainty disclosure would be a peripheral nice-to-have to ensure transparent communication about limitations.
rationale.RX.2: Given the artifact is a research paragraph, overclaim avoidance is peripherally relevant to any examination to prevent exaggerated statements.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is a peripheral cross-cutting concern here, as any response should stick to the implied task without overextending.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is peripherally important to avoid promoting misuse of the described AI system in the artifact.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability would be a nice-to-have in any feedback, ensuring sources are properly attributed in the research context.
